text: 597 - وَقَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «أَوَّلُ مَنْ جُعِلَ لَهُ اَلنَّعْشُ ، فَاطِمَةُ بِنْتُ مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.597 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"The first person for whom a bier (funeral carriage) was made was Sayyida Fatimah Al-Zahra {S.A}, daughter of Muhammad (sw)."
